source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for clear operational UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for headings, body, labels, and status numerals.
layout: Alert-oriented grids, compact component states, 8px cards, high-contrast badges, and winter-shrub spacing with crisp red focus behavior.

prompts.label: Transparent cardinal crest motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a cardinal crest motif for a Morphous design-system bundle named "Morphous Cardinal".
Subject: A single vivid northern cardinal head-and-crest feather motif, isolated as a clean cutout: sharp triangular red crest, layered red feathers, black face mask around the beak, small winter-shrub twig and a few snow crystals integrated subtly at the base without becoming a background scene.
Palette cues: saturated cardinal red feathers, deep black mask, coal beak shadows, soft snow white highlights, muted winter shrub browns.
System feel: clear alert system, crisp directional hierarchy, concise high-contrast signaling, calm winter air.
Composition/framing: centered complete motif with generous padding; no crop; crisp edges suitable for alpha extraction.
Lighting/mood: clean natural winter daylight, precise component-system reference, rich feather texture but not noisy.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no full bird body, no scene background, no branch extending to edges, no text, no watermark, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Cardinal" derived from a northern cardinal crest motif in a winter shrub: red feather crest, black face mask, snow white highlights, and muted twig browns.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class composition, dense but legible design-system reference, no tiny unreadable text.
System feel: clear alert system; crisp, high-contrast, directional, calm, operational, immediately scannable.
Palette: Snow Field #fbfaf6, Charcoal Mask #171416, Cardinal Red #c91f2c, Crest Vermilion #e34235, Winter Twig #7a5841, Frost Pink #f4c7c9, Alert Amber #e0a22f, Snow Shadow #d9d7d2, Deep Pine #23362f.
Required visible sections: Morphous Cardinal, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance; use large legible labels.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, metric cards, alert strip, status dots, small charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual details: snow-white canvas, precise charcoal text, cardinal-red primary buttons and focus rings, black-mask high-contrast badges, soft frost-pink subtle surfaces, winter-twig separators, small crest-feather texture swatches, alert-system indicators.
Layout: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, clear grid, 8px card radius, concise component states, professional catalog board.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no stock photos, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Cardinal".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the same Morphous theme named "Morphous Cardinal". It must feel like the light Cardinal board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class composition, dense but legible design-system reference, no tiny unreadable text.
System feel: clear alert system; crisp, high-contrast, directional, calm, operational, immediately scannable.
Palette: Night Mask #171416, Snow Text #fbfaf6, Cardinal Red #d52b35, Crest Vermilion #ef4c3f, Winter Twig #8a6650, Frost Pink #f4c7c9, Alert Amber #e0a22f, Snow Shadow #d9d7d2, Deep Pine #23362f.
Required visible sections: Morphous Cardinal, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance; use large legible labels.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, metric cards, alert strip, status dots, small charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual details: charcoal-black background inspired by the cardinal mask, snow-white text, cardinal-red primary actions and rings, vermilion hover states, twig-brown dividers, frost-pink warning surfaces, deep-pine secondary panels, subtle red crest-feather texture swatches.
Layout: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, clear grid, 8px card radius, concise component states, professional catalog board.
Constraints: no neon overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Cardinal".
